name: plugin lifecycle: /uninstall-cleanup category-by-category removes plugin-shipped config categories (skills, agents, hooks, detectors)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cache && touch .claude-tdd-pro/cache/x && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/uninstall-cleanup.sh" --category cache --confirm yes && [ ! -d .claude-tdd-pro/cache ] && echo ok 1>&2
